products.title: Fork
products.description: The Fork is a classic utensil for various dining and serving purposes. Its durable and ergonomic design makes it a reliable choice for everyday use.

products.description: The Plate is a classic and essential dishware item for serving meals. Its durable and stylish design makes it suitable for everyday use or special occasions.

products.description: Versatile cooking oil suitable for frying, sautéing, and various culinary applications.

products.title: Mulberry
products.description: Sweet and juicy mulberries, perfect for snacking or adding to desserts and cereals.

products.title: Glass
products.description: The Glass is a versatile and elegant drinking vessel suitable for a variety of beverages. Its clear design allows you to enjoy the colors and textures of your drinks.

products.title: Spoon
products.description: The Spoon is a versatile kitchen utensil for stirring, serving, and tasting. Its ergonomic design and durable construction make it an essential tool for every kitchen.

products.title: Ice Cream
products.description: Creamy and delicious ice cream, available in various flavors for a delightful treat.

products.title: Rice
products.description: High-quality rice, a staple for various cuisines and a versatile base for many dishes.

products.title: Black Aluminium Cup
products.description: The Black Aluminium Cup is a stylish and durable cup suitable for both hot and cold beverages. Its sleek black design adds a modern touch to your drinkware collection.

products.title: Ice Cube Tray
products.description: The Ice Cube Tray is a practical accessory for making ice cubes in various shapes. Perfect for keeping your drinks cool and adding a fun element to your beverages.

products.title: Yellow Peeler
products.description: The Yellow Peeler is a handy tool for peeling fruits and vegetables with ease. Its bright yellow color adds a cheerful touch to your kitchen gadgets.

products.title: Feather Shuttlecock
products.description: The Feather Shuttlecock is used in the sport of badminton. It features natural feathers and is designed for high-speed play, providing stability and accuracy during matches.

products.title: Honey Jar
products.description: Pure and natural honey in a convenient jar, perfect for sweetening beverages or drizzling over food.

products.title: Egg Slicer
products.description: The Egg Slicer is a convenient tool for slicing boiled eggs evenly. It's perfect for salads, sandwiches, and other dishes where sliced eggs are desired.

products.title: Red Tongs
products.description: The Red Tongs are versatile kitchen tongs suitable for various cooking and serving tasks. Their vibrant color adds a pop of excitement to your kitchen utensils.
